items.name_cn:
M11380
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

specs.rawTitle:
M11380
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

items.name_en: M11448 Zebra! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced toys. The Monogram canvas is accented with a zebra image and Epi calfskin appliqué, adding a colorful and playful touch to everyday looks.
items.name_cn:

11 x 7 x 0.5 cm.

items.name_en: M12598 Black Flower! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, featuring a practical design that holds coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. The wallet features a snap closure and includes a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zip coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.

items.name_en: M12635 New Embossed! Victor Wallet. This compact Victor wallet is made from Monogram Shadow calfskin, embellished with delicate Monogram embossing patterns, exuding an air of 'understated luxury.' The interior offers practical organization with a zip pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flap features a snap closure and is embellished with the Louis Vuitton signature.

items.name_cn:
M13399 ( - )
The Rosalie coin wallet is an elegant everyday essential, designed compactly with a circular front flap secured with a gold snap button. Part of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series re-edition, it is made of Monogram coated canvas inspired by the artist's iconic style. Inside features a zip coin pocket with a coordinating colorful lettering pull tab.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5cm

items.name_en: M13399 Black & Color! LV x TM Rosalie Coin Purse This Rosalie coin purse is designed to be small, with a rounded front flap fastened by a gold button, an elegant daily essential. This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series coin purse is made of bright Monogram coated canvas, inspired by the signature style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a zippered coin pocket inside, perfectly accented with a matching colorful Monogram pull tab.

items.name_en: M13403 Black & Colorful! LV x TM Card Holder. This replica of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami collaboration series offers a playful new interpretation with rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas, the classic Monogram pattern is designed with the artist's signature vivid colors, while the top is accented with a bright pink. The card holder is suitable for large business cards and receipts inside, and features two classic card slots on the outside.

items.name_en: M13408 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag Louis Vuitton SARAH Wallet series classic! Murakami interior design clever, with many pockets and card slots. Made of pure copper hardware with soft calfskin... exquisitely crafted, paired with Swiss imported zippers, synchronized with the boutique, practical and versatile essential. Size 19x10cm.

items.name_en: M13409 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Coin Purse This timeless Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zipper coin purse combines practical function with a playful style, appearing even more vibrant this season. The coin purse is made of Monongram coated canvas and paired with cheerful rainbow tones, paying tribute to the distinctive color style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized.

items.name_cn:
M13409 Black Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
As part of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue, the timeless Zippy coin purse is practical and playful, elevated for this season. Made from Monogram coated canvas with joyful rainbow tones that match the artist's signature pop palette. It features a silver zip closure and is divided into multiple compartments for coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm

items.name_en: M13664 Black & Colorful! LV x TM Key Coin Purse. This replica of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is vibrant and made of coated canvas, featuring a lively Monogram pattern reinterpreted with the rainbow color tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The key coin purse features a silver zipper and comes with a chain and hook for securely storing keys.
